message.content:
<teammate-message teammate_id="team-lead" summary="Encouraging progress on Task #3">
I can see you're making progress on Task #3 — test changes and static/js/ directory started. Good. Keep going. Remember: commit at every green step and push immediately. The team is standing by to review.
</teammate-message>

content.text: Task #3 is actually already complete. The HTMX commit (`a68f9a2`) was pushed and CI passed green. Let me confirm the current state.

input.content:
Just to clarify -- Task #3 (HTMX progressive enhancement) is already complete and pushed. Commit a68f9a2, CI green. Working tree is clean.

The commit includes:
- HTMX 2.0.4 in static/js/htmx.min.js, script tag in base.html
- todo_item.html partial with hx-post/hx-target/hx-swap on toggle and delete forms
- todos.html add form with hx-post, hx-target=".todo-list", hx-swap="beforeend"
- Server-side HX-Request detection in post_todo, post_toggle_todo, post_delete_todo
- 4 new HTMX integration tests, all 57 tests pass

Task #4 (aria-live announcements) is now unblocked. Task #5 (password toggle) also appears done (commit 649fb5d, CI green).

I'm available if there's more work to do.
input.summary: Task #3 already done, CI green, available for work

routing.summary: Task #3 already done, CI green, available for work

The commit includes:
- HTMX 2.0.4 in static/js/htmx.min.js, script tag in base.html
- todo_item.html partial with hx-post/hx-target/hx-swap on toggle and delete forms
- todos.html add form with hx-post, hx-target=".todo-list", hx-swap="beforeend"
- Server-side HX-Request detection in post_todo, post_toggle_todo, post_delete_todo

Task #4 (aria-live announcements) is now unblocked. Task #5 (password toggle) also appears done (commit 649fb5d, CI green).

I'm available if there's more work to do.

content.text: Standing by. Task #3 is complete, Task #4 is in progress (someone else picked it up), and Task #5 is complete. Waiting for the team lead to assign new work or confirm there's nothing left for me to drive.
